name: Maeil Dairies Co., Ltd.
summary: Maeil Dairies Co., Ltd. produces, sells, and exports milk products and baby foods in Korea and internationally. It offers white and flavored milk, yogurt, cheese, coffee, juices, and grain beverages; baby foods, snacks, and beverages; butter, cream, and condensed milk products; prepared foods; and imported food products. The company also operates restaurants. Maeil Dairies Co., Ltd. was founded in 1969 and is headquartered in Seoul, South Korea.
